untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of (IV - Forecast RV) vs Historical Normal Spread. Implied volatility (IV) and realized volatility forecast are not available in the allowed indicator set. Only india_vix (proxy for market IV) and hvol_20 (historical volatility) are available as approximations. The precise calculation of 'normal spread' as a dynamic threshold cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy translation using india_vix as IV proxy and hvol_20 as realized volatility estimate, with normal_spread_range converted to 22% threshold. This is a degraded approximation. The original signal is inherently untranslatable without explicit IV and RV forecast data feeds.
